australia.title: First fourteen days on the ground
australia.subtitle: A humane sequence for skilled movers—your visa conditions and employer timing may reorder tasks.
australia.footnote: Not legal advice. Confirm every step on official sites and with your migration planner.

milestones.title: Land, data, and sleep
milestones.body: Buy a prepaid SIM or eSIM, screenshot your visa grant, and prioritise rest before big decisions. Note the local emergency number (000).

milestones.title: Basecamp address
milestones.body: Short-term stay or lease—collect mail you can use for bank and service sign-ups. Photograph metre readings if renting.

milestones.title: Tax file number (TFN)
milestones.body: Apply online through the ATO with passport details. Keep the confirmation email in a dedicated folder.

milestones.title: Banking & cash flow
milestones.body: Book a branch slot if needed. Ask what proof-of-address bundle your bank accepts while you are still in temporary housing.

milestones.title: Medicare or interim cover
milestones.body: Eligibility depends on visa subclass. Until Medicare is active, avoid gaps in cover that could affect care or travel.

milestones.title: Transport & ID rhythm
milestones.body: Tap card for city transit; if driving, confirm how long your overseas licence remains valid in your state.

milestones.title: Phone, internet, utilities
milestones.body: NBN appointments can lag—book early. Compare plans using your actual address, not a hotel postcode.

milestones.title: Reflect and calendar the month ahead
milestones.body: Super choice, tax withholding, and any employer onboarding—map appointments so you are not stacking stress in one week.

new-zealand.title: First fourteen days in Aotearoa
new-zealand.subtitle: Wind, rain, and compact cities—front-load connectivity and warmth.
new-zealand.footnote: Illustrative order only. Follow INZ conditions for your visa.

milestones.title: Arrive warm and dry
milestones.body: Layer clothing; buy a local SIM; save photos of your visa label or eVisa details.

milestones.title: IRD number path
milestones.body: Employers need an IRD for payroll. Gather address evidence even if you are in temporary accommodation.

milestones.title: Bank account
milestones.body: Compare migrant-friendly onboarding; ask how international transfers will display on statements.

milestones.title: Transport habits
milestones.body: AT Hop, Snapper, or regional cards—pick the right city card and register it online.

milestones.title: Driving rules
milestones.body: Check conversion timelines for your overseas licence; rural roads reward patience.

milestones.title: Rent bond & flat norms
milestones.body: Flatting interviews move quickly—have references PDF-ready in phone storage.

milestones.title: Healthcare navigation
milestones.body: Register with a GP practice if eligible; understand what is not covered while you settle.

milestones.title: Community hooks
milestones.body: Sports clubs, library cards, and volunteer shifts are low-pressure ways to build a network.

canada.title: First fourteen days in Canada
canada.subtitle: Winter readiness and provincial paperwork differ by city—treat this as a compass, not a checklist stamped in stone.
canada.footnote: Provincial health and licensing rules vary. Verify for your province.

milestones.title: Layer zero
milestones.body: Winter jacket, toque, gloves—buy locally if your luggage was light. Load offline maps for transit dead zones.

milestones.title: SIN queue strategy
milestones.body: Service Canada appointments or walk-ins—bring passport and permit showing work or study rights.

milestones.title: Bank + debit first
milestones.body: Credit history may start from zero—ask about newcomer programs and secured card ladders.

milestones.title: Provincial health card
milestones.body: Waiting periods exist in some provinces—keep private cover until you understand the gap.

milestones.title: Transit pass rhythm
milestones.body: PRESTO, Compass, Opus—name the local card and auto-load to avoid fines.

milestones.title: Phone plan reality
milestones.body: Compare cold-weather battery drain on commutes; unlimited data tempts but check throttling.

milestones.title: Winter commute dry run
milestones.body: Walk the route to work or campus once in daylight and once after dark.

milestones.title: Month-two preview
milestones.body: Tax forms, winter tires fund, and any professional licence transfers—book consults before slots vanish.

united-kingdom.title: First fourteen days in the UK
united-kingdom.subtitle: Compact distances, dense admin—keep PDFs synced across phone and laptop.
united-kingdom.footnote: Immigration rules differ by route—confirm share codes and conditions on GOV.UK.

milestones.title: Oyster, railcard, feet
milestones.body: Tap in/out religiously; max fare caps sting. Save your tenancy or hotel invoice immediately.

milestones.title: NI number appointment
milestones.body: Book the earliest interview you can; payroll may still begin in parallel depending on employer.

milestones.title: Bank account marathon
milestones.body: Proof-of-address stacks vary—university letters, council tax, or utility bills each unlock different banks.

milestones.title: GP catchment
milestones.body: Register near your postcode; some surgeries cap new patients—call a shortlist.

milestones.title: Council tax band sanity
milestones.body: Understand who pays if you flatshare; keep the reference number for future lettings.

milestones.title: SIM vs contract
milestones.body: Rolling monthly SIMs reduce commitment while you hunt stable housing.

milestones.title: Right to rent / work codes
milestones.body: Practice generating share codes before landlord or HR meetings.

milestones.title: Culture cadence
milestones.body: Markets, parks, and local libraries are cheap resets when paperwork fatigue hits.

student-australia.title: First fourteen days as a new student
student-australia.subtitle: Orientation, compliance, and social oxygen—pace yourself around contact hours.
student-australia.footnote: Always follow your institution’s orientation pack and your visa conditions.

milestones.title: Airport → housing handover
milestones.body: Photograph the room condition report; test Wi-Fi; save campus security numbers.

milestones.title: Campus card & email
milestones.body: Activate student email, LMS logins, and printing credits before week-one deadlines pile up.

milestones.title: OSHC card on phone
milestones.body: Add policy numbers to wallet apps; know which clinics direct-bill your insurer.

milestones.title: Bank + TFN thread
milestones.body: Many students open accounts during orientation fairs—compare fee waivers before you sign.

milestones.title: Concession transport
milestones.body: Order student concession proofs; learn peak vs off-peak fares for your commute pattern.

milestones.title: Casual job recon
milestones.body: Walk nearby retail strips with CV PDF ready; note which venues hire continuously vs seasonally.

milestones.title: Study cohort rituals
milestones.body: Join one society that is not career-related—creative balance prevents burnout.

milestones.title: Assignment runway
milestones.body: Export your semester calendar including mid-session breaks; block deep-work slots early.
